meta.title: GlobalBridge — Bridge to Global Markets
meta.description: Professional B2B globalization services helping Chinese enterprises expand overseas through market entry, agent partnerships, and supply-chain integration.

hero.description: We provide Chinese enterprises with overseas market entry, agent recruitment, and supply-chain integration so you can scale globally with confidence.

about.title: 8 years of globalization expertise
about.paragraph1: Founded in 2016, GlobalBridge is a specialist agency helping Chinese enterprises enter overseas markets. We operate across Europe, North America, and Southeast Asia.
about.paragraph2: Our senior team brings 10+ years of cross-border experience, deeply understanding cultural and regulatory nuances to deliver executable strategies for our clients.

features.title: End-to-end globalization solutions
features.description: From market research to operational execution — every link of your global journey is covered.

market.title: Market Expansion
market.desc: Enter European, American, and Southeast Asian markets with localized strategy and curated resources.

partners.title: Agent Partnerships
partners.desc: Global agent recruitment and management to build resilient distribution networks and rapid coverage.

supply.title: Supply Chain
supply.desc: Integrated supplier resources, delivering an end-to-end procurement-to-fulfillment solution.

compliance.title: Compliance & Risk
compliance.desc: Deep local regulatory knowledge to mitigate risk and keep your expansion compliant.

growth.title: Growth Consulting
growth.desc: Data-driven overseas growth roadmaps, from positioning to on-the-ground execution.

team.title: Local Team Support
team.desc: Consultants in 30+ countries ready to respond to your business needs in real time.

manufacturing.name: A manufacturing leader
manufacturing.result: Entered the European market in 6 months, onboarded 12 regional agents, and crossed 8-figure annual sales.

saas.name: A tech company
saas.result: Secured first overseas funding round through our network and 3x'd their valuation.

consumer.name: A consumer brand
consumer.result: Grew Southeast Asia revenue 300% YoY, becoming a top-3 regional brand.

q1.q: How long does an engagement take?
q1.a: From 3-month market research to 12+ months of in-depth execution depending on the scope. We lock down a clear timeline before kickoff.

q2.a: A hybrid of retainer + performance share — aligned with your goals. The exact structure depends on project complexity.

q3.q: Which industries do you focus on?
q3.a: Industrial manufacturing, consumer goods, consumer electronics, and cross-border SaaS. We welcome conversations from other sectors case-by-case.

q4.a: All communications and client data are encrypted and access is SSO-gated with full audit logs. NDAs available pre-engagement.

q5.q: Can I buy a single service module?
q5.a: Yes. We support modular engagements and incremental add-ons as needed.

cta.title: Ready to go global?
cta.description: Chat with a consultant via the widget on the lower right, or reach us directly by email or phone.

footer.tagline: Professional B2B globalization services connecting Chinese enterprises to the world.
footer.madeWith: Made with care for B2B builders.

chat.title: Live Support
